category_long: Google-native CRM for agencies and consultants

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Copper's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Copper is under-represented in third-party 'best CRM' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Copper lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: HubSpot vs alternatives: what should I switch to?
